memberdef.name: I16ToF32ObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "cvt.I16ToF32", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(I16ToF32Object), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)I16ToF32Obj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "I16ToF32 type.", .tp_methods = I16ToF32Obj_methods, .tp_new = I16ToF32Obj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)I16ToF32Obj_init, }
